About Organization

The Uttar Pradesh Public Service Commission (UPPSC) is a government agency responsible for conducting exams and recruitments for various government jobs in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India.

The UPPSC is committed to providing equal opportunities to all candidates and ensuring a fair and transparent recruitment process.

About the Programme

The UPPSC GIC Lecturer Recruitment 2025 is a government job opportunity for master's degree holders in related subjects to work as lecturers in government intermediate colleges in Uttar Pradesh, India.

The programme aims to provide quality education to students in government intermediate colleges and to promote the development of education in the state.
